description: Today `make install` installs only `bl` (+ the `balls` symlink + completions) — NOT the shipped sibling plugins (tracker, bl-delivery, gate). So a deployed bl resolves no tracker sibling (Edge::resolve looks beside the bl binary) and `bl prime` founds stealth-only — federation silently never engages. Restructure the Makefile: (1) `make install-core` installs just the bl core binary + balls symlink + completions; (2) `make install-<plugin>` for each shipped plugin — `install-tracker`, `install-delivery`, `install-gate` — each installs that binary beside bl; (3) bare `make install` (no target) installs the whole suite = core + every plugin. Relevant at greenfield cutover (project note: don't make install til cutover). Surfaced by bl-be5f.
title: make install: per-component targets + full-suite default
